🧾 Add Invoice

📄 Drop PDF/image → AI auto-fills fields
Invoice Total: MVR 0
Balance Amount: MVR 0
🛂 Compliance Update (optional)
WP Fee amount ÷ 350 = months added to Work Permit expiry. QF amount ÷ 2000 × 12 = months added to Quota expiry. Insurance Fee > 0 auto-renews +12 Months. Applies only when status becomes Completed/Paid.

🛂 Compliance Tools
Reset an employee's WP / Quota / Insurance / Medical / Visa expiry dates to a clean baseline and clear their renewal history — useful after testing or correcting a wrong auto-update.
🗑 Finance Data Reset
✅ Companies, Employees & Individuals are NEVER deleted by these buttons
📥 Import / Export Data
📤
Export Excel/CSV
Download all employee data as CSV
Columns included:
Name · Nationality · Company · Passport No/Exp · Medical Exp · Insurance Exp · WP No/Exp · Visa No/Exp · WP Fee · Med/Ins/Visa Cost · Phone · WhatsApp · Email · Designation · DOB
📥
Import CSV
Upload employee data from CSV file
How it works:
• File must match the column format below
• Existing employees (matched by name) get updated
• New rows are added as new employee records
• Empty optional fields are safely skipped
💾
Backup & Restore
Full system backup — all tabs, all data
✅ Includes: Employees · Companies · Invoices · Payroll · Cash Sheet · Petty Cash · WP Balance · Medical Tracker · Tasks · Notes · Individuals · Settings · Users
📊
Data Summary
Financial totals across the system
📋 CSV Import Format
name,nationality,company_id,passport_no,passport_exp,medical_exp,insurance_exp,wp_no,wp_exp,visa_no,visa_exp,wp_fee,med_cost,ins_cost,visa_cost,phone,whatsapp,email,designation,dob
🔒
Data Safety Status
Checking...
🗄️
Auto-Backup (IndexedDB)
Silent backup every 12 hours · 30-day rolling history · no file downloads needed
Checking...
Loading...
☁️
Google Drive Sync
Live sync with Google Sheets + auto backup to Drive
Not Connected
📌 Setup: script.google.com → New Project → Paste code → Deploy as Web App → Copy URL above
🔄 Auto-sync: Saves automatically. Monthly snapshot = backup_2026-06.json in Drive folder.
📅 Monthly Backup History
Connect Drive and click Refresh to see backups
